ecarx.carext.update.ota

Interface VersionInfo


  • public interface VersionInfo
    Represents a version.
    Since:
    5

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getBSSID()
      Returns baseline software structure identifier.
      java.lang.String getDescription()
      Returns the description.
      default android.os.Bundle getExtraInfo()
      Returns extra info.
      java.lang.String getInstallationOrder()
      Returns the installation order(taskUuid).
      int getInstallationSpentTime()
      Returns the time spent for installation.
      long getTotalSize()
      Returns the total size of this version.
      java.lang.String getVersionName()
      Returns the version name.

    • Method Detail

      • getBSSID

        @NonNull
java.lang.String getBSSID()
        Returns baseline software structure identifier.

        Returns the installation order(taskUuid).

        @NonNull
java.lang.String getVersionName()

java.lang.String getDescription()

      • getTotalSize

        long getTotalSize()
        Returns the total size of this version.
        Returns:
        The size, in bytes.
        Since:
        5

      • getInstallationSpentTime

        int getInstallationSpentTime()
        Returns the time spent for installation.
        Returns:
        The time in seconds.
        Since:
        5

      • getExtraInfo

        @NonNull
default android.os.Bundle getExtraInfo()
        Returns extra info.

        Since:
